# License — patterns-haikei

## Upstream

- No upstream asset was copied. The folder name references haikei.app as the stylistic category (blobs, waves, layered peaks, stairs, topography, mesh gradients) — those categories are generic SVG-background patterns not exclusive to any one tool.
- All 40 SVG files in this folder were authored from scratch.

## Acquisition note

No scraping, no copying, no tracing. Files produced by deterministic generator `/tmp/gen_haikei.py` using mathematical primitives (sin, cubic smoothing, ellipse stacks, blurred circle overlays) and a palette selected from the Clawmachine visual-decisions document.

## Use in Clawmachine

No restrictions. Internal non-commercial prototype use. If the project ships publicly, these can be released alongside it under whatever license Clawmachine adopts (CC0 recommended, given they have no external claims on them).
